description.content: Manage data connections used by Qlik Sense applications for loading data from external sources

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections

description.content: Retrieves a list of all data connections in condensed format, optionally filtered by a query expression. Returns connections accessible to the authenticated user based on security rules.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.
Filter expression using syntax: property operator value (e.g., name eq 'MyConnection')
Property name to order results by
Whether to append privilege information to returned entities

response.name: List of data connections returned successfully

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Create data connection

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Create data connection

description.content: Creates a new data connection for use by Qlik Sense applications. The connection defines the provider type, connection string, and credentials for accessing an external data source.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections with full details

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List data connections with full details

description.content: Retrieves a list of all data connections in full format including owner, tags, custom properties, and connection string details.

query.description: (Required) Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.
Filter expression using syntax: property operator value (e.g., name eq 'MyConnection')
Property name to order results by
Whether to append privilege information to returned entities

response.name: Full list of data connections returned successfully

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Count data connections

description.content: Returns the number of data connections matching an optional filter expression.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Data Connection API

description.content:
REST API endpoints within the Qlik Sense Repository Service for managing data connections and data sources used by Qlik Sense applications. Data connections define how Qlik Sense connects to external databases, files, and web services for data loading and real-time queries.

Contact Support:
 Name: Qlik Support
